headline: AvalonBay Q2 FFO Beats Estimates on Same-Store Gains, '26 Views Raised
summary: AVB tops Q2 core FFO estimates, raises its same-store outlook and advances development plans as it moves closer to its proposed merger.

raw.headline: AvalonBay Q2 FFO Beats Estimates on Same-Store Gains, '26 Views Raised
raw.summary: AVB tops Q2 core FFO estimates, raises its same-store outlook and advances development plans as it moves closer to its proposed merger.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $196
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $198 to $196.
